title: rethunk-git MCP preset file
description: Schema for .rethunk/git-mcp-presets.json (at the git repository root). Supports a wrapped layout with an explicit presets object, or a legacy flat map of preset name to entry.

$schema.description: JSON Schema $schema pointer for editor validation.

schemaVersion.description: File format version; use 1 for this schema.

presets.description: Named preset entries for git_inventory / git_parity.

schemaVersion.description: Optional file format version when using the flat preset map.

nestedRoots.description: Paths relative to the git toplevel, in order, for git_inventory.

parityPairs.description: Path pairs for git_parity (paths relative to git toplevel unless absolute).

workspaceRootHint.description: When multiple MCP file roots exist, restrict preset resolution to a root matching this basename or path suffix.
